title: Agent upgrade missed hardcoded name array while fixing count literal
rootCause: pka_dream.py lines 37-41 contain a hardcoded AGENTS list that was not updated when WRAITH was added. FORGE updated the display string '/13' -> '/14' (line 141) but did not trace back to the source array that drives the count, leaving WRAITH silently excluded from dream reports.
whyNotCaught: The stale-reference scan searched for count literals but not for hardcoded agent-name arrays. Symptom found; data source missed. CRUCIBLE frontmatter sweep had no scope over operational scripts.
whyFixWorked: Added WRAITH to the AGENTS list at line 40 — the single source of truth for journal scans. /14 display string is now backed by data.
preventNextTime: Any add-agent operation must grep for hardcoded name arrays in scripts/. Fix the array first; derive display strings from len(AGENTS) not literals.
generalizablePattern: Display/data divergence: fixing visible symptom without tracing to data source. Fix the store, not the display.
